name: page-dialogue-npc-targeting-audit-fix
title: Page dialogue NPC targeting audit and fix
description: Verify and fix tavern page dialogue targeting where public channel copy and NPC prompt context make selected NPCs sound like a proxy messenger or unaware of co-present NPCs.
creator: lijin
notes: Browser audit confirmed old public-channel copy said “我会把话递给对应的人” and an @青柚 question about 弥夏 produced “走错地方”, even though 弥夏 is a co-present NPC. Fixed page copy to describe direct NPC targeting. Added prompt-only co_present_characters roster to PromptBuildConfig and passed same-tavern NPC roster from v1 runtime, legacy web prompt builder, and owner preview. No DB/schema/enum changes.
